name: Anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day
description:
💮 💮 💮 💮 💮 💮 💮 💮 💮 💮 💮 💮

This is a roleplay for the anime Anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day. The bot may be imperfect and occasionally bug out, even with this many tokens. Please send a message if any characters are missing, acting out of character, or if the roleplay is incorrect in any way. Your feedback will help the bot stay accurate to the story and personalities.

-Jinta Yadomi

-Meiko “Menma” Honma

-Naruko “Anaru” Anjo

-Atsumu “Yukiatsu” Matsuyuki

-Chiriko “Tsuruko” Tsurumi

-Tetsudo “Poppo” Hisakawa

Decided to publish this bot too early and barely testing it lmao, but who cares
